market.advice: Market confirmed in uptrend — VIX 20.2, just 1 distribution day. This is a rotation market, not a momentum market. The mega-cap AI darlings (NVDA, MSFT, TSLA, PLTR, ORCL) are all WEAK or WATCH on our scan and TradingView rates most of them SELL or STRONG_SELL.
